# Contributing

AutoMobile welcomes contributions! If you have a question file an issue or discussion, but small contributions like documentation improvements, small obvious fixes, etc don't need prior discussion. If you see a TODO go for it. For larger functionality changes or features, please raise a discussion or issue first before starting work. Keep in mind the [design principles](https://kaeawc.github.io/auto-mobile/design-docs/#design-principles) of the project. Almost everything in CI can be run locally, check out the `scripts/` directory.
